headline: Brian Armstrong Admits Bitcoin Didn’t Deliver Satoshi’s Vision, Something Else Did
summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says Bitcoin missed Satoshi's vision as everyday money while stablecoins took the payments role.

raw.headline: Brian Armstrong Admits Bitcoin Didn’t Deliver Satoshi’s Vision, Something Else Did
raw.summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says Bitcoin missed Satoshi's vision as everyday money while stablecoins took the payments role.

headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Says $60,000 Is the Bottom for Bitcoin. Where Does BTC Go From Here?
summary: Historically, Bitcoin has rallied from steep market downturns to hit new all-time highs.

raw.headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Says $60,000 Is the Bottom for Bitcoin. Where Does BTC Go From Here?

headline: Coinbase CEO Changed His Profile Picture and This Meme Coin Soared 37x
summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong's profile picture swap sent Base meme coin $BRIAN from $1M to $37M, then crashed it 90%.

raw.headline: Coinbase CEO Changed His Profile Picture and This Meme Coin Soared 37x
